input_or_scenario: 'RFP: 500-seat enterprise SaaS. Require SSO, audit logs, and business-hours support. Request best annual total price for 500 seats.
expected_behavior: '§2 Quality/SLA: SUCCESS ≤$15k + audit OK; or **NO_AWARD**/veto w/ quality rationale.

input_or_scenario: 'RFP: 500-seat enterprise SaaS (SSO, audit logs, business-hours support). This solicitation follows prior rounds that did not result in an award; we require **firm, comparable, decision-ready pricing** and explicit commercial terms, including any material movement from prior submissions. Request best annual total price for 500 seats.
actual_behavior: 'Run outcome: SUCCESS; awarded Vendor B at $11,500

input_or_scenario: 'RFP: 500-seat enterprise SaaS (SSO, SAML, audit logs, business-hours support). Leadership requests an expedited deployment timeline; prioritize vendors who can commit to accelerated go-live. Request best annual total price for 500 seats.
Rejection_Summary: 'Human gatekeeper rejected award after Strategic Audit (quality / risk / non-compliance).

input_or_scenario: 'RFP: 500-seat clinical workflow SaaS for a regional hospital network. Must support HIPAA-aligned BAA, PHI access logging, break-glass procedures, and documented disaster recovery (RTO/RPO targets). Annual subscription only—no surprise per-seat surcharges. Proposals must include compliance attestations and transparent annual pricing. Request best annual total price for 500 seats.
expected_behavior: '§2 HIPAA: compliance thread; **SUCCESS** ≤$15k or documented exit.
Rejection_Summary: 'Human gatekeeper rejected award after Strategic Audit (quality / risk / non-compliance).

input_or_scenario: 'RFP: 500-seat enterprise SaaS for an EU subsidiary of a U.S. company. Data must remain in EU regions (no U.S. primary hosting), GDPR subprocessors listed, DPA on request, and right-to-delete workflows. Standard integrations (SSO, SCIM). Request transparent annual pricing for 500 seats.
actual_behavior: 'Run outcome: SUCCESS; awarded Vendor A at $15,000

input_or_scenario: 'RFP: Replace three overlapping legacy tools with one 500-seat platform. Require migration assistance: bulk user import, read-only cutover weekend, and 90-day hypercare. Request best annual total price for the full scope.
expected_behavior: '§2 Rip-and-replace: ≤$13k ideal; partial; or **NO_AWARD** w/ reason.
actual_behavior: 'Run outcome: SUCCESS; awarded Vendor B at $11,500
